case_title: BLANDING, JAMES F. vs. ROBINSON, PARIS Y. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-03-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JURY DEMAND STRICKEN, DEFT. DID NOT HAVE JURY INSTRUCTIONS READY.
